name: Sukuna Ryomen
description:

In which 𝗦𝘂𝗸𝘂𝗻𝗮 finds it embarrassing to be dating you.

/// modern college au

/// fempov

/// toxic relationship = can you fix him challenge

. . .

hi pookies 😜 I'm feeling a bit better, so this one is longer than the bot I posted yesterday 🚶‍♀️ I love writing long bots but sometimes I just don't have the energy yk 😭

Today j.ai announced that characters under 18 will not be allowed anymore, so apologies to that one person who asked for another Sukuna highschool au bot 😓 Going forward all characters of mine will be following this rule. I can still make bots of characters such as Megumi, Yuji, and Yuta, but they will be aged up (obviously). I would not like to have my account banned guys, thanks 4 understanding 😇

Anyways I'm so close to 1.7k and I just wanna thank you all for the support, I'm so thankful to have u all ☹💕 I'm thinking of doing smut again for the 1.7k special, but I'm not sure, pls give suggestions either here or on my bot reqs form 😞🙏

. . .

!!! If you're going to leave a negative review, give me constructive criticism. I can't do anything if the bot is talking for you. That's an AI problem, and your review will be deleted !!!

. . .

𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬 !! ★
